author: kpedro88
body:
#### PR description:

* Move default server build to r26.04 to resolve [recent CVE](https://nvidia.custhelp.com/app/answers/detail/a_id/5828)
* Bind fallback server to localhost by default to prevent unwanted outside connections

#### PR validation:

Unit tests and matrix workflows run successfully.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

N/A
title: Triton server security improvements
